headline: Malaysian Podcast Industry Reaches 8.5 Million Listeners
context: Malaysian podcast listenership reached 8.5 million in 2025 with Malay-language content driving 65% of consumption.

cards.big: Malaysian podcast listeners reach 8.5 million in 2025
cards.sub: Malay-language podcasts drive 65% of consumption with true crime leading

cards.big: Top 20 Malaysian podcasts earn combined RM12 million annually
cards.sub: Advertising revenue per listener remains 80% below US market rates

cards.big: Spotify reports Malaysia among top 10 Southeast Asian podcast markets
cards.sub: 280 new Malaysian podcasts launched in 2025 across all 3 major languages

cards.big: Content creators struggle to monetize with average earning RM2,800 monthly
cards.sub: Platform algorithms favour English content reducing Malaysian language discovery

cards.big: Podcast growth tests whether local audio content can build sustainable creator economics
8.5 million podcast listeners. Audio content thrives in Malaysia because it fits commute patterns and mobile habits.
